subcodes.first_line: O assured leaf! Thy letter, which thou hadst written to Jináb-i-Hájí, hath arrived, its contents reflecting devotion to the Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه موقنه نامه ات که بجناب حاجی مرقوم نموده بودی رسید مضمون تبتل بملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
